title: Delhi High Court grants interim bail to Baramulla MP Engineer Rashid to attend father’s funeral
description: The Delhi High Court on Monday granted an interim bail to jailed Baramulla Member of Parliament (MP) Abdul Rashid Sheikh alias Engineer Rashid till June 2 to attend the burial and last rites rituals of his father. Rashid is presently in jail on terror funding allegations.His father passed away in the early hours of the day at AIIMS, Delhi. The MP, therefore, urged the High to grant him interim bail to attend his father's funeral.The interim bail application was mentioned today before the Bench o
